title: Utreexo
description: Utreexo compresses UTXO commitments using accumulator proofs to reduce full-node state costs. It shifts part of the burden to proof generation and verification pipelines.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Utreexo
resources.notes: Operational and protocol implications for accumulator-based nodes.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts Tag: Utreexo
resources.notes: Engineering talks on proof sizes and node integration.
